Biggest Needle Movers: Sales Letter & On-Page 



1. Button placement or timer. 



Sounds obvious but this is a big one. 



Examples: 

- HL12 (Kutasi Tests)



- Burn (From 5 Minutes to 35 Minutes) – 60% + lift



- HBI (Free Trial So Actually Changing Timer Backwards) – Last check was a 25% lift, but curious to see how it ends up.  



- Stem Cell Restore (TSL)



Original: 

https://www.greenvalleynaturalsolutions.com/funnel/scr/Stem-Cell-Restore-A-136.php



SPG Control Beater

https://greenvalleynaturalsolutions.com/stem-cell-restore/Stem-Cell-Restore-B.php



More notes on this SCR one: it’s not just that buy button options are way lower. 



Also note I’m talking about the product way later too. 



First I’m educating them (with a good mechanism), then selling them afterwards.  





2. Lead type: 



When you have a fact-based lead –> Test emotional, story, or curiosity lead. 



When you have emotional lead -> Test different emotional lead, curiosity, or story  



When you have a story lead -> Test different story, curiosity, or emotional lead. 



Examples: 



Lift Factor

- Original

https://www.liftfactornow.com/







Barely tested this and the reason why is because I just knew it sucked. That was my experience but I’d bet any amount of money this is true. 



- Mom-Daughter Version

https://get.liftfactornow.com/









LPP IGR+ 

- Original:

https://sale.getigrplus.com/



- New Emo Version:

https://sales.getigrplus.com/



- Household Objects Version:

https://www.dropbox.com/s/16b7zy83f6nwytb/IGR%20Plus-salesPage-part1.jpg?dl=0



Still testing but this is where we’re focused on moving the needles. 





Complete Thyroid

Original

5 Second Test Version



Already showed examples of this. 





3. Price Point Tests: 



Can make a huge difference. Sometimes taking a higher price point and going lower. Sometimes the opposite is true as well though too…



Examples:



GS-85



Testing Lower Price Points: 



Regular:

1 Bottle = $69

3 Bottles = $59/each

6 Bottles = $49/each 

CPA = $95



New Price Point:

1 Bottle = $39

3 Bottles = $35

6 Bottles = $29

CPA: $55



What we found: 

1. Lower Price Point Gave Us 4x Conversions

2. EPCs were $0.27 higher

3. Declines Dropped From 15% to 4%!

4. Ability to run at scale on FB for extended period of time because of the economics. 



Look At Original:











Now Look At A Single Month of the LPP











Lift Factor: 

Changed single bottle FE Price point from $69 to $79



What happened? 



- Conversions actually improved slightly. 



- But more importantly, AOV went up by $30+ because people were more likely to buy 3/6 bottle packages. 













4. VSL vs. TSL on Desktop/Mobile/Tablet



Example: Tinnitec



VSL: 

Mobile: 0.5%

Tablet: 0.75%

Desktop: 3.2%



TSL: 

Mobile: 1.1%

Tablet: 1.6%

Desktop: 3.44%



So we just started rerouting all the mobile and tablet traffic to the TSL instead of the VSL. 



Increased overall conversions by an average of 0.5%...



For one of our biggest affiliates, who runs Native to a lot of traffic, the increase was 0.9%.. 









5. Other things to look at: 

- Load times

- Page Design

- Package Presentation (Monthy or Per Bottle Vs. Total, Highlighting Best Value)

- Voice Over Artists (HUGE LIFT)

- Background Music

- Font Size

- Bonuses

- Guarantee Length

- Add more testimonials and proof
